Careers / Graduate intake FY26

Real work. Real responsibility. From day one.

We don't run a glossy graduate program. We run real operations and we hand graduates real problems. If you want hand-holding, you'll be bored. If you want to learn fast, keep reading.

Open roles

5 positions open.

Most roles are based in Perth with rotations to site. Mining roles are FIFO. All roles report to a named manager — see the listing for details.

What to expect

Our hiring process.

Straightforward. Four steps. No assessment-centre theatrics.

STEP 01

Apply

Submit your CV and a short cover letter through the role page. We read everything ourselves — there's no AI screen.

STEP 02

Interview

One conversation with the hiring manager. About 30 minutes. Real questions about the work, not brain teasers.

STEP 03

Offer

Decisions within a week of interviews wrapping up. Salary, conditions, and a start date — all on the table up front.

IronVale

Mid-tier Western Australian producer of iron ore and critical minerals. Headquartered in Perth, operating across the Pilbara and Goldfields-Esperance regions.
